raw_consumer_statement:
I recently sent an Identity Theft report filed through the FTC to all 3 major credit bureaus- XXXX, XXXX, and XXXX. I have a credit card account through Citibank that is Identity Theft and all 3 bureaus denied this report. 

I have attached a copy of the letter sent to XXXX with all of the supporting documentation regarding what I sent to all 3 bureaus regarding my ID theft.
